title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Dr.maria Deomampo-cerezo As Consultant for the Municipal Nutrition Program with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Ten Thousand Pesos (P 10,000.00). Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 01/23/2023
